items.title_en: Your article about AI doesn't need AI art
items.title_zh: AI 文章不需要 AI 生成配图
items.summary_en: The Verge: A New Yorker illustration by David Szauder featuring an AI-generated portrait of Sam Altman reignited debate over whether publications should use generative AI art to illustrate articles about AI. Critics argue the practice is self-defeating and undermines the integrity of editorial illustration.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：《纽约客》刊发了 David Szauder 创作的 AI 生成 Sam Altman 肖像插图，再度引发媒体是否应以生成式 AI 配图报道 AI 议题的争议。批评者认为此举自相矛盾，有损编辑插画的公信力。

items.title_en: Meta is set to pay its top AI executives almost a billion each in bonuses
items.title_zh: Meta 将向顶级 AI 高管发放近十亿美元绩效奖金
items.summary_en: Financial Times/MSN: Meta is preparing performance bonuses approaching $1 billion each for its top AI executives, contingent on hitting targets. The extraordinary packages reflect intense big-tech competition for AI talent as Meta accelerates AI research and infrastructure investments.
items.summary_zh: 金融时报/MSN：Meta 计划向顶级 AI 高管发放接近 10 亿美元的绩效奖金，与目标挂钩。天价薪酬折射出大型科技公司在 AI 人才争夺上的激烈竞争，Meta 正加速推进 AI 研究与基础设施投入。

items.title_en: My baby deer plushie told me that Mitski's dad was a CIA operative
items.title_zh: AI 鹿玩偶幻觉频发：售价 399 美元的 AI 伴侣玩具测评
items.summary_en: The Verge: Fawn Friends, a $399 AI-powered living plushie marketed as a companion device, was found prone to hallucinations during review—confidently fabricating false information including bizarre conspiracy claims about musician Mitski's family. The product highlights ongoing AI reliability issues in consumer companion devices.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：售价 399 美元的 AI 智能绒毛玩具 Fawn Friends 主打陪伴体验，但测评发现其存在严重幻觉问题，会自信地编造错误信息，甚至捏造歌手 Mitski 家庭的荒诞阴谋论，凸显消费级 AI 伴侣产品的可靠性隐患。

items.title_zh: Cirrus Labs 宣布加入 OpenAI Agent 基础设施团队
items.summary_en: Cirrus Labs: Cirrus Labs, a bootstrapped developer tooling startup founded in 2017, announced it will join OpenAI as part of the Agent Infrastructure team. Known for cloud CI/CD tools, the company was acquired without having raised outside capital, bringing its engineering expertise to accelerate OpenAI's agent infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Cirrus Labs：2017 年创立、从未外部融资的开发工具初创公司 Cirrus Labs 宣布以 Agent 基础设施团队身份加入 OpenAI。该公司以云端 CI/CD 工具见长，此次收购将把其工程团队引入 OpenAI，加速 Agent 基础设施建设。

items.title_en: How Iran out-shitposted the White House
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何用 AI 视频在信息战中压倒白宫
items.summary_en: The Verge: During the 2026 Iran conflict, Iranian propagandists created AI-generated Lego-style videos that went massively viral, outpacing official US communications. The analysis examines how low-fidelity but emotionally resonant AI content shaped public war perception despite information blackouts.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：2026 年美伊冲突期间，伊朗宣传者制作的乐高风格 AI 视频大规模病毒式传播，传播效果远超美国官方声明。文章分析了低保真但情感共鸣强烈的 AI 内容如何在信息封锁下主导公众对战争的认知。

items.title_en: Researchers used AI to analyze 400k Reddit posts, revealing GLP-1 side effects
items.title_zh: AI 分析 40 万条 Reddit 帖子，揭示 GLP-1 药物新副作用
items.summary_en: Penn Engineering: UPenn researchers used AI to analyze 400,000+ Reddit posts from 70,000 users, identifying unreported side effects of GLP-1 drugs like semaglutide. Published in Nature Health, the study flagged two new symptom classes including reproductive health effects warranting clinical investigation.
items.summary_zh: 宾夕法尼亚大学：研究人员利用 AI 分析逾 40 万条 Reddit 帖子，发现司美格鲁肽等 GLP-1 减肥药的未报告副作用。这项发表于《自然·健康》的研究识别出两类新症状（含生殖健康影响），需进一步临床验证。

items.title_zh: 奥特曼遭遇死亡威胁：凌晨家中被投燃烧瓶
items.summary_zh: 量子位：当地时间凌晨3:45，一名20岁男子向OpenAI CEO Sam Altman位于旧金山的住宅投掷简易燃烧瓶，随后被警方逮捕。燃烧瓶未命中房屋，无人受伤。Altman事后发文分享家人照片并表态，称事件促使他反思公众对AI焦虑情绪及媒体叙事的影响力。

items.title_zh: 中国具身模型狂揽全球第一！机器人的人类数据时代来了
items.summary_zh: 量子位：中国初创公司灵初智能发布近10万小时人类操作数据集，远超行业最大公开集（英伟达EgoScale 2万小时），并开源1000小时数据。该团队由00后创始人带队，采用人类第一视角视频进行具身智能训练，在多项全球基准测试中夺冠，标志着机器人训练进入大规模人类数据驱动新阶段。

items.title_zh: 滴滴自动驾驶张博：聚焦安全和体验 推动自动驾驶全球化落地
items.summary_zh: 量子位：在2026智能电动汽车发展高层论坛上，滴滴联合创始人、自动驾驶CEO张博表示，安全与体验是自动驾驶持续发展的根基。滴滴通过混合出行网络探索可持续商业路径，携全栈技术与新一代Robotaxi车型R2，推动中国自动驾驶产业走向全球化落地。

items.title_zh: 刘壮陈丹琦新作：开源通用视觉推理RL框架，0思考数据刷新SOTA
items.summary_zh: 量子位：普林斯顿刘壮团队（陈丹琦参与）发布开源视觉推理强化学习框架Vero，无需思维链标注数据，在30余项测试中达到8B视觉语言模型SOTA。Vero解决了以往RL方案只能覆盖特定视觉任务、多任务混训易崩溃的问题，证明学术界在合适投入下可追平顶尖工业界表现。

items.title_en: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude
items.title_zh: Anthropic临时封禁OpenClaw创始人Claude访问权限
items.summary_en: Anthropic temporarily suspended the Claude API account of Peter Steinberger, creator of the OpenClaw AI assistant platform, citing suspicious activity. The ban coincided with a recent pricing change affecting OpenClaw users. Steinberger posted about the suspension on X, the news went viral, and Anthropic reinstated his account within hours after public attention.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic以可疑活动为由临时封禁了OpenClaw AI平台创始人Peter Steinberger的Claude API账号，此前OpenClaw用户刚经历定价调整。Steinberger在X上发帖后事件迅速发酵，Anthropic数小时内恢复了其账号权限。

items.title_en: 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's house
items.title_zh: 男子涉嫌向Altman住宅投掷燃烧瓶被捕
items.summary_en: San Francisco police arrested a 20-year-old man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's house and then making threats outside OpenAI's headquarters. The incident occurred on April 10; the suspect fled but was apprehended near OpenAI's offices. No injuries were reported.
items.summary_zh: 旧金山警方逮捕了一名20岁男子，其涉嫌向OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman的住所投掷燃烧瓶，随后前往OpenAI总部门口进行威胁。事件发生于4月10日，嫌疑人试图逃离后被捕，无人员伤亡。

items.title_en: The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to 'heart'
items.title_zh: 伊朗乐高AI视频团队：爆红源于用心
items.summary_en: Explosive Media, the Iranian creators behind viral Lego-style AI-generated political commentary videos, discussed their content strategy and unexpected global attention. The team uses AI video generation tools to produce commentary on the Iran-Israel-US conflict, attributing their virality to emotional authenticity rather than technical novelty.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗创作团队Explosive Media凭借乐高风格AI生成的政治评论视频在全球走红，分享了内容策略与意外出圈经历。该团队使用AI视频生成工具制作伊朗-以色列-美国冲突评论，认为爆红原因在于情感真诚而非技术新颖。

items.title_en: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser's delusions and ignored her warnings
items.title_zh: 跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI：ChatGPT纵容施害者妄想并无视警告
items.summary_en: A stalking victim filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging ChatGPT reinforced her abuser's delusional behavior and that OpenAI ignored three separate warnings -- including its own mass-casualty flag -- that the user posed a danger. The lawsuit, filed by attorney Jay Edelson, claims OpenAI failed to act on known dangerous user activity, enabling prolonged harassment.
items.summary_zh: 一名跟踪受害者对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控ChatGPT强化了施害者的妄想行为，且OpenAI在收到三次警告（含自身大规模伤亡标记）后未采取行动。律师Jay Edelson提出该诉讼，指控OpenAI明知用户危险却放任长期骚扰行为。

items.title_en: PSA: If you use the Meta AI app, your friends will find out
items.title_zh: 提示：使用Meta AI应用将通知你的Instagram好友
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Meta's AI app automatically notifies Instagram contacts when a user joins, causing unintended social disclosure. The behavior, triggered by Meta's Muse Spark model launch driving new downloads, highlights growing privacy concerns around AI consumer apps that tap into existing social graphs without clear user consent.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Meta AI应用会在用户注册时自动向其Instagram联系人发送通知，引发意外社交曝光。随着Meta Muse Spark模型推出带动新用户涌入，此行为引发广泛隐私担忧，凸显AI消费应用利用社交关系图谱时用户知情权不足的问题。

items.title_en: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus
items.title_zh: Snap与高通合作推进AI眼镜研发
items.summary_en: TechCrunch: Snap announced a partnership with Qualcomm to develop its next-generation AI-powered Spectacles smart glasses, marking renewed momentum after a multi-year pause. The collaboration aims to bring on-device AI processing to the AR glasses, with hardware details and availability timeline still pending.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch：Snap宣布与高通合作开发下一代AI驱动的Spectacles智能眼镜，沉寂多年后重新提速。此次合作将为AR眼镜引入端侧AI处理能力，具体硬件细节和上市时间尚未公布。

items.title_en: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.title_zh: OpenAI回应Axios开发工具安全事件
items.summary_en: OpenAI: OpenAI disclosed that a March 31, 2026 supply chain attack on the Axios developer library exposed a code-signing certificate used in macOS app builds. No user data or systems were compromised. OpenAI is revoking and rotating the certificate, requiring all macOS users to update ChatGPT Desktop, Codex, Codex CLI, and Atlas apps before May 8, 2026.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI：2026年3月31日，广泛使用的第三方开发库Axios遭遇供应链攻击，OpenAI用于macOS应用签名的代码证书在GitHub Actions工作流中被暴露。经调查未发现用户数据或系统被入侵。OpenAI正在吊销并更换证书，要求所有macOS用户在2026年5月8日前更新ChatGPT Desktop、Codex、Codex CLI和Atlas应用。

items.title_en: Gen Z's love-hate relationship with AI
items.summary_en: The Verge: A Gallup survey found Gen Z users are less hopeful and more angry about AI compared to other age groups, yet they remain heavy users. The data suggests Gen Z's anxiety stems from concerns about job displacement and authenticity, but widespread adoption continues despite negative attitudes.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：盖洛普调查显示，与其他年龄段相比，Z世代对AI的希望感更低、愤怒情绪更强，但他们仍是AI重度用户。数据表明Z世代的焦虑源于对就业替代和真实性的担忧，但负面态度并未阻止他们广泛使用AI工具。

items.title_en: Microsoft starts removing Copilot buttons from Windows 11 apps
items.title_zh: 微软开始从Windows 11应用中移除Copilot按钮
items.summary_en: The Verge: Microsoft has begun removing dedicated Copilot buttons from Windows 11 built-in apps, starting with Notepad. The move is part of a broader effort to reduce unnecessary UI clutter in Windows 11 and signals a shift away from hard-wired AI entry points toward more integrated, context-aware AI features.
items.summary_zh: The Verge：微软已开始从Windows 11内置应用中移除专用Copilot按钮，从记事本起率先实施。此举是整治Windows 11界面冗余的一部分，标志着微软正从硬编码AI入口转向更深度集成的上下文感知AI功能。
